ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

invoice.document_type: Commercial Invoice with Export Accompanying Document and Packing List
invoice.quality_notes: Multi-page document. Pages 1-3 are export/customs documents. Pages 4-6 are the commercial invoice (3 pages). All text clearly legible.

document_pairing.method: Consignor match + Consignee match + Order reference match
document_pairing.pairing_notes: Certificate does not explicitly reference an invoice number. However, the certificate's consignor (SKF Sverige AB) matches the invoice issuer, the consignee (SKF Vietnam CO Ltd) matches the invoice's Bill to/Sold to party, the order number (20250224-006-TD) matches in both documents, and the goods description matches. Pairing is valid via consignor+consignee+order reference.

sanity_check.notes: Consignor SKF Sverige AB identified in invoice header/issuer. Consignee SKF Vietnam CO Ltd identified in invoice Bill to/Sold to fields.

locations: Invoice page 4: header/issuer block 'SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden'
Invoice page 4: footer 'Issued by: SKF Sverige AB'
Invoice page 5: footer 'Issued by: SKF Sverige AB'
Invoice page 6: footer 'Issued by: SKF Sverige AB'
Invoice page 2: Export document 'SKF SVERIGE AB, VON UTFALLSGATAN 2, LOGISTICS SERVICES / NOR-4'

rule_activation.lc_verification_note: No LC reference found in certificate. Certificate number SEG-25D-374856 does not constitute an LC reference per rule 2.2.

candidates.raw_text: 105 Ton Dat Tien, Tan Phu Ward, 700000 Ho Chi Minh, Viet Nam
candidates.normalized_text: 105 ton dat tien, tan phu ward, 700000 ho chi minh, viet nam

candidates.raw_text:
1 COLLIE, 1 PCS SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG
R2, F4 Crescent Plaza Bldg, 105 Ton Dat Tien Street, Tan My Ward, Ho Chi Minh 700000, Vietnam
candidates.normalized_text: r2, f4 crescent plaza bldg, 105 ton dat tien street, tan my ward, ho chi minh 700000, vietnam

candidates.source: Invoice page 4, goods line; also pages 5, 6
Invoice page 4, Country of origin column header + 'Sweden' listed under it
Invoice page 4, Net kg column; also page 6 Total Net Weight 286,000 KG
Invoice page 4, and page 6 line detail
Invoice page 6, Country of origin column per line

candidates.raw_text: The exporter of the products covered by this document (Exporter Reference No. SEREX5562408301) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of European Union preferential origin.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-25D-374856' does not contain an LC bank term reference. Verification proceeds with all checkpoints per section 4.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SKF Sverige AB, Kvibergs Broväg 8, SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.detail: Consignor name 'SKF Sverige AB' found directly as invoice issuer in invoice header on page 4 and in footer on all invoice pages. Exact name match after normalization.

comparison_steps.result: Invoice issuer identified as 'SKF Sverige AB' in header block on page 4.
comparison_steps.detail: The invoice is issued by SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden.
Certificate consignor: 'SKF Sverige AB'. Invoice issuer: 'SKF Sverige AB'. Names are identical after normalization.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sweden' (explicit in issuer address block). Also confirmed by VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556240830101.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - consignor name found directly as invoice issuer

checkpoints.motivation: The certificate consignor 'SKF Sverige AB' is identical to the invoice issuer 'SKF Sverige AB' found in the invoice header on page 4. Country Sweden matches exactly. The street addresses differ (Kvibergs Broväg 8 vs von Utfallsgatan 4) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when name and country are verified.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'SKF Sverige AB, Kvibergs Broväg 8, SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice text: 'SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden'. Name normalization: both normalize to 'skf sverige ab'. Country: both 'Sweden'. Rule 4.1.0 applied - direct match found as invoice issuer. Rule 4.1.5 applied - address difference does not affect MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, 105 Ton Dat Tien, Tan Phu Ward, 700000 Ho Chi Minh, Viet Nam
checkpoints.invoice_value: SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, R2, F4 Crescent Plaza Bldg, 105 Ton Dat Tien Street, Tan My Ward, Ho Chi Minh 700000, Vietnam

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice contains explicit 'Bill to' field with 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd'. This is the primary identification field per priority order.
Certificate: 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd'. Invoice Bill to: 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd'. Names are identical after normalization.
Certificate: 'Viet Nam'. Invoice: 'Vietnam'. These normalize to the same country.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification - Bill to field is primary factureringsfält
Name verification - SKF Vietnam CO Ltd matches exactly
Country verification - Viet Nam normalizes to Vietnam
Address differences do not cause MISMATCH when name and country match

checkpoints.motivation: The certificate consignee 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd' is found in the invoice's Bill to field as 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd' — identical name. Country 'Viet Nam' in certificate normalizes to 'Vietnam' in invoice. The ward name differs slightly ('Tan Phu Ward' vs 'Tan My Ward') and the address has additional detail in the invoice, but per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country are verified.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate: 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, 105 Ton Dat Tien, Tan Phu Ward, 700000 Ho Chi Minh, Viet Nam'. Invoice Bill to: 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, R2, F4 Crescent Plaza Bldg, 105 Ton Dat Tien Street, Tan My Ward, Ho Chi Minh 700000, Vietnam'. Company name: exact match after normalization. Country: 'Viet Nam' ↔ 'Vietnam' — standard normalization. Address differences (ward name, building detail) are irrelevant per 4.2.4.

comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain an explicit article number in the goods description. The certificate number SEG-25D-374856 is the certificate's own reference number, not an article number.
Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning: 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG'. This exact text string is found in the invoice on page 4 (goods line), page 5, and page 6.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning identified and matched exactly

checkpoints.motivation: The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning in the certificate is 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG'. This exact text is found verbatim in the invoice on pages 4, 5, and 6 as the goods description. No normalization needed — exact match.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 6: '1 COLLIE, 1 PCS SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG / SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG'. Invoice page 4 goods line: 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG'. Invoice page 6 line description: '84823000 SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG'. Exact text match. No article number in certificate to verify via Priority 1.

comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 contains '1 pcs'. This is the verification-basis quantity.

Certificate: 1 pcs. Invoice: Quantity = 1, UoM = PC. The numeric value 1 is explicitly found in the invoice quantity column. Per rule 4.4.3, it is sufficient that the numeric value can be identified in the invoice.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity identified as verification basis: 1 pcs
Förekomstkontroll - numeric value 1 identified in invoice quantity column
Numeric value verification - value 1 found in invoice

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 7 states '1 pcs'. The invoice quantity column on page 4 shows '1' with unit 'PC' on page 6. The numeric value 1 matches exactly. Per rule 4.4.3, the numeric value in the certificate can be identified in the invoice. No contradicting quantity information found in the invoice.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '1 pcs'. Invoice page 4 Quantity column: '1'. Invoice page 6 UoM: 'PC'. Numeric value 1 = 1. Exact match. The invoice also contains weight data (Net 286,000 KG, Gross 310,000 KG) but the certificate does not specify weight in box 7 — only '1 pcs'. Per 4.4.3.1, verifying at least one quantity (1 pcs) is sufficient. The additional weight data in the invoice does not contradict the certificate since the certificate doesn't claim any weight.

checkpoints.invoice_value: Sweden (Country of origin column, page 4); SE (origin code per line, page 6)

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice page 4 has explicit column header 'Country of origin' with value 'Sweden'. Invoice page 6 has 'Country of origin' column with value 'SE' per line.
'SWEDEN' (certificate) normalizes to 'sweden'. 'Sweden' (invoice) normalizes to 'sweden'. 'SE' is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden. All equivalent.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in explicit 'Country of origin' field in invoice
Normalization of country name - SWEDEN / Sweden / SE all equivalent

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 3 states 'SWEDEN'. The invoice on page 4 has an explicit 'Country of origin' column with value 'Sweden'. On page 6, the origin code 'SE' is shown per line. After normalization, SWEDEN = Sweden = SE. Single origin, unambiguous match.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice page 4 column header: 'Country of origin', value: 'Sweden'. Invoice page 6 column: 'Country of origin', per-line value: 'SE'. Both 'Sweden' and 'SE' are standard representations of Sweden. Rule 4.5.4 allows normalization of full name to ISO code. No contradicting origin information found anywhere in the invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate

Certificate from Document A (1 page). Invoice from Document B (pages 1-3 are export/customs documents, pages 4-6 are the commercial invoice). Invoice file contains both export customs document and commercial invoice.
PASS - consignor SKF Sverige AB matches invoice issuer, consignee SKF Vietnam CO Ltd matches invoice Bill to
MATCH - SKF Sverige AB found as direct invoice issuer

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority identification - Bill to field
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - SKF Vietnam CO Ltd in Bill to field
MATCH - Viet Nam normalizes to Vietnam

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG exact match
MATCH - numeric value 1 found in invoice
MATCH - Sweden found in explicit Country of origin field
MATCH - SWEDEN / Sweden / SE all equivalent

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: LC exception should be activated due to certificate number containing letter combinations
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate number 'SEG-25D-374856' does not contain an LC bank term reference. The letters 'SEG' do not constitute 'LC', 'L/C', or any other Letter of Credit designation per rule 2.2.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignor address difference (Kvibergs Broväg 8 vs von Utfallsgatan 4) should cause MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country are verified. Both addresses are in Göteborg, Sweden.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee ward name difference (Tan Phu Ward vs Tan My Ward) should cause MISMATCH
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country are verified. The company name SKF Vietnam CO Ltd matches exactly, and the country Vietnam matches.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren SKF Sverige AB, mottagaren SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, varubeskrivningen 'Spherical Roller BRG', kvantiteten 1 styck och ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) verified as MATCH. Certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce for SKF Sverige AB shipping 1 pcs Spherical Roller Bearing to SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, origin Sweden. All data confirmed in commercial invoice 9310094119 issued by SKF Sverige AB dated 09.09.2025.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: SKF Sverige AB, Kvibergs Broväg 8, SE-415 05, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: SKF Sverige AB, von Utfallsgatan 4, 415 50 Göteborg, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning via 4.1.0 – consignor identifierad som fakturautställare
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'SKF Sverige AB' i certifikatet är identiskt med fakturans utställare. Land Sverige bekräftas i fakturans adressblock och via VAT-prefix SE. Skillnaden i gatuadress påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.certificate_value: SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, 105 Ton Dat Tien, Tan Phu Ward, 700000 Ho Chi Minh, Viet Nam
sections.invoice_value: SKF Vietnam CO Ltd, R2, F4 Crescent Plaza Bldg, 105 Ton Dat Tien Street, Tan My Ward, Ho Chi Minh 700000, Vietnam
sections.rule_applied: Mottagare identifierad i fakturans Bill to-fält med exakt namnmatchning
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'SKF Vietnam CO Ltd' i certifikatet matchar exakt fakturans Bill to-fält. Land 'Viet Nam' normaliseras till 'Vietnam'. Adressskillnader (ward-namn, byggnadsinformation) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning exakt matchad
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG' i certifikatet förekommer ordagrant i fakturan på sidorna 4, 5 och 6.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – numeriskt värde 1 identifierat i fakturans kvantitetskolumn
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger '1 pcs'. Fakturan anger kvantitet 1 med enhet PC. Numeriskt värde 1 matchar exakt.

sections.rule_applied: Landnormalisering – SWEDEN, Sweden och SE är ekvivalenta
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 3 anger 'SWEDEN'. Fakturan har ett explicit 'Country of origin'-fält med värdet 'Sweden' och landskod 'SE' per artikelrad. Alla tre representerar Sverige.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH with confidence >= 0.97. Overall result IDENTICAL is consistent. No checkpoint has confidence below 0.85.
